microsoft_ft: Scaled Azure's recovery validation program into a **platformized system**, standardizing workflows to sustain 45+ annual resilience drills and drive $14M+ impact across enterprise customers including Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Led **0→1 development** of an internal Resilience Automation Platform, defining product requirements and self-service scheduling features that cut operational toil by 30% and enabled scalable, repeatable release execution.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability, delivering a rack-level drill program in 4 months with a **94% recovery rate**, surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a new continuous validation model.

Directed 14 cross-org recovery executions under executive visibility, including serving as bridge lead for a **sovereign-cloud** network isolation test tied to a $1.5B+ enterprise contract requiring mission-critical reliability.

Communicated product roadmap milestones and release timelines to senior stakeholders across engineering, sales, and customer success, ensuring **launch readiness** and cross-functional alignment ahead of each program increment.
Built an internal AI agent and restructured planning workflows to reduce **planning cycle time by 39%** and increase drill capacity by 21%, expanding team leverage without adding headcount.

Cultivated strategic relationships with enterprise partners by leading customer product briefings and translating market requirements into prioritized roadmap features aligned to customer business needs.
microsoft_2023: Championed **product adoption** for AI-driven code generation workflows, conducting user demos and training sessions that drove utilization across 14 key Azure service teams and saved 37 engineering hours monthly.

Shaped the product roadmap to include intent-based YAML generation by facilitating **11+ customer interviews** with Azure service teams, surfacing critical feature gaps and translating findings into documented market requirements.

Improved data retrieval and content discoverability by implementing rigorous metadata standards and migrating documentation to an **AI-powered semantic search** tool, reducing lookup time by 83% across internal teams.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched regions 28% faster by securing cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework spanning 140+ teams across Azure's global infrastructure organization.

Built a product strategy to eliminate operational toil during region launches, conducting **discovery with 20+ service teams** to identify 81 hours of manual effort per region and roadmapping automation for the highest-impact paths.

Engineered a **Power BI dashboard** tracking operational toil across 140+ teams, enabling leadership to target automation gaps, prioritize high-value investments, and communicate progress against roadmap commitments.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit pilot transition by defining the legacy OS migration strategy, mapping software dependencies across 1,200+ stations, and aligning IT, Operations, and Engineering stakeholders.

Facilitated Agile sprint planning and retrospectives, prioritizing the backlog to resolve **40+ high-priority tickets** and stabilize the developer intake process, improving release predictability across the robotics software team.

Drove cross-functional alignment between IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement automated **CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and reducing manual release effort across the organization.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by optimizing end-to-end scoping and invoicing workflows for 200+ monthly proposals, implementing a new CRM process that improved sales ops efficiency and customer conversion rates.

Reduced **Customer Acquisition Cost by 13%** and boosted conversions by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy, optimizing the website and Google Business profile to drive qualified inbound demand.

Improved leadership pricing decisions by conducting **financial profitability analysis** across 1,000+ project records, identifying and sealing margin leaks that directly strengthened per-job contribution margins.
